nasb.text: Moreover, there shall be a great cry in all the land of Egypt, such as there has not been before and such as shall never be again.

esv.text: There shall be a great cry throughout all the land of Egypt, such as there has never been, nor ever will be again.

cnv.text: 在埃及全地必有大哀號；這樣的哀號從前未曾有過，以後也必再沒有。

ccb.text: 那时整个埃及必充满悲惨的哭号声，惨况空前绝后。
